curation.synopsis: Lucian Gerrit is a rogue trader, heir to an ancient charter granting trade and conquest rights along the lawless Eastern Fringe. But his inheritance is little more than mounting debt and faded glory. In a final, desperate gamble to restore his dynasty, Gerrit strikes a bargain on a forgotten Imperial world, pledging his family's ships and fortune to one warlord's long war against a rival. As the conflict escalates and his own children pursue their separate ambitions, Gerrit finds himself drawn into something far larger than a frontier squabble: first contact and confrontation with a young, expanding alien power, the T'au Empire. The deal that was meant to save his house may instead cost him everything.
